历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13669 → 15701 → 12706 → 19439 → 26233, showing a clear downward trend in the last two years. In 2024, it dropped about 6733 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it dropped another 6794 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative drop of over 13500 places. The baseline for 2025 is about 26233. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province Physics Category was 39 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 60 in 2025, with continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 67, an increase of 7 (11.7%) over 2025. Continuous expansion broadens competition, putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has risen continuously from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a drop of over 500 places in rankings in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in Chinese Medicine programs in Heilongjiang, Jilin, and other provinces, with the minimum admission ranking falling to the second-tier line, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on 2026 application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd (average), with low short video exposure, not forming a significant popularity boost. Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and related majors correspond highly to the enrollment programs, and the social popularity of Chinese Medicine/Clinical Medicine majors remains consistently hot, providing stable attraction for candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Medicine and Clinical Medicine majors have been in the 'Recommended' to 'High Heat Recommended' range in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with stable application willingness. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,480). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 267,844 (a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025), with slightly intensified competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangxi Province, so there is no provincial enrollment preference. The university...

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the continued enrollment expansion of about 11.7% in 2026 broadening competition, the substantial improvement in the university's Soft Science ranking enhancing attractiveness, the negative reputation possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in total candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 26233, the expansion effect and ranking improvement effect offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 27869, with a range of 27369–28369.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 27369–28369, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine Experimental Class, Chinese Materia Medica Shizhen National Medicine Class, Acupuncture and Tuina) as the main direction. Tier 1 flagship majors (Leading Talent Training Program, Hua Tuo Class, Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program) can be targeted as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Big Data Management and Application, etc.) serve as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 long-program majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2894 → 2003 → 2253 → 2714 → 2111, fluctuating within the 2000–2900 range without a clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 2111, moving forward by about 603 places compared to 2024's 2714; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi was 5 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 3 in 2025, with a small and fluctuating number; the 2026 plan is 4, an increase of 1 (+33.3%) from 2025, a significant expansion, putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has risen continuously from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to ranking declines and signal gaps in some provinces during the 2025 admission season, which may somewhat suppress application psychology in 2026; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd (average), without significant popularity boost; the majors offered in History Category (Acupuncture and Tuina, English, Public Service Management) have average relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category majors are mainly Acupuncture and Tuina, English (Medical), and Public Service Management; English/foreign language majors have average popularity with a wait-and-see attitude, public management majors show differentiation with a wait-and-see attitude, overall popularity is stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, with History Category estimated at about 207,056 (a slight increase from 206,055 in 2025), competition slightly intensifies; Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangxi, with no provincial admission preference; the History Category enrollment plan is very small (only 3–5 people), with small admission scale, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by individual candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation in the 2000–2900 range, the 33.3% expansion in 2026 putting downward pressure on rankings, the university's ranking improvement enhancing attractiveness, and a slight increase in total candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 2111, the expansion effect is the main driver, and the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to be about 2503, with a range of 2052–2954.
